blocks.text: Custom Printed Gift Boxes
Branded Rigid, Folding Carton and Carton Mailer Gift Boxes Engineered for Corporate and Retail Packaging
Custom Made Manufacturer in Vietnam – Jinhao Xinyuan Group

Jinhao Xinyuan Group specializes in custom printed gift boxes for retail brands, cosmetics companies, electronics manufacturers, premium product lines and corporate gifting programs.We produce rigid boxes, folding cartons and printed corrugated gift boxes using FSC-certified materials and advanced printing technologies.

Our factories in Vietnam and China operate under ISO 9001, FSC®, SMETA and GMI standards to ensure consistent color reproduction, structural stability and export-ready packaging that aligns with brand identity.
Custom printed boxes can be developed from customer artwork or fully engineered by our prepress and structural design teams.
Precise Logo Reproduction
Fully Custom Structures
Premium Brand Presentation
Pantone-matched printing, GMI-controlled color accuracy and high-resolution artwork reproduction.
Custom die-lines, CAD development and product-fitting engineering for all shapes and sizes.
High-end finishing options including foil stamping, embossing and textured specialty papers.
Materials & Construction

Materials include greyboard (1.5–3.0 mm), paperboard (250–450 gsm), and corrugated flutes depending on structure.Wrapping and print surfaces include art paper, kraft paper, specialty textured papers, metallic papers and sustainable fibers.
Our Product Range

Jinhao Xinyuan Group manufactures a complete range of corrugated packaging boxes. With integrated printing, die-cutting, corrugation, and gluing, we ensure every structure meets the functional and branding requirements of your industry.
Custom Rigid Boxes
Custom Folding Carton Boxes
Custom Corrugated Gift Boxes

Rigid boxes wrapped in printed or specialty papers with brand-specific artwork.Available in magnetic, drawer, book-style, collapsible and two-piece structures.Ideal for cosmetics, premium retail, electronics and corporate gifts.

Offset printed cartons with precise artwork alignment and finishing.Suitable for lightweight retail goods, beauty products, accessories and consumer products.Options for window patching and protective coatings.

Printed mailer boxes using offset or flexo printing on B, E, BE and BC flutes.Used for e-commerce, subscription gifting, seasonal packaging and promotional campaigns.Available with tear strips, reinforced corners and internal dividers.
Specialty Printed Gift Boxes
Structural Customization
Includes textured materials, foil boards, holographic finishes, sustainable kraft-based prints and limited edition packaging.Suitable for premium branding and retail product launches.
Custom die-lines, engineered inserts and tailored closure systems.Designed to ensure product stability, correct weight support and optimized unboxing experience.
Our Vietnam facility is structured so clients can combine multiple corrugated formats in one shipment — improving logistics and MOQ flexibility.
Applications
Custom printed gift boxes are used for cosmetics, electronics, apparel sets, jewelry, promotional kits, subscription boxes, seasonal gifting and branded retail packaging.
They are tailored to the client’s artwork, brand guidelines and product requirements.
FSC® & ISO-Certified Sustainable Production

Options include FSC-certified paper and greyboard, recycled materials, water-based inks, low-VOC coatings and eco-friendly laminations.All factories follow ISO 9001 and SMETA frameworks for sustainable and compliant packaging production.
Get a Quote

Our engineering and prepress teams provide structural development, artwork alignment, sampling and mass production support for custom printed gift boxes.Contact us for quotations or export packaging inquiries.
